conclusion: The two errors do NOT share a mechanism and must not be combined into one experiment.

approved-wine-018.primaryCause: glyph fusion / token grouping under tight kerning
secondaryFactors: page-segmentation mismatch (sparse text on a full page)

evidence.note: A 1px gap separates the Alc. period from the numerals, and one 44px-wide run spans merged glyphs. The leading 1 is the narrowest glyph, so it is the one lost when the gap closes under 1.5x cubic resampling.
evidence.ocrBehaviour: On a line crop at production settings the 1 IS recovered ('Al 13 5% by Vol Ch') but the decimal is lost. Only a hand-tuned marker+number crop with psm=singleWord yields a clean '13.5%'.

approved-wine-018.earliestStageCorrectDigitAbsent: OCR recognition in the primary full-image pass; the 1 never enters token grouping, so every downstream stage is innocent

approved-wine-037.primaryCause: Tesseract character confusion (3 read as 9) under low dynamic range with inverted polarity
secondaryFactors: insufficient effective resolution of the region within the full-image pass

evidence.note: Segmentation is clean; glyphs are well separated. The 3 and the 0 have identical bounding boxes (w14 h32), so the failure is shape discrimination, not grouping.
evidence.ocrBehaviour: A tight line crop at the SAME production treatment and SAME page-segmentation mode reads '13.0' correctly and deterministically (conf 80).

approved-wine-037.earliestStageCorrectDigitAbsent: OCR recognition in the primary full-image pass; a re-read of the same pixels at higher effective resolution recovers the correct digit
approved-wine-037.resolvedByAnyGeneralTreatment: partially - recoverable as an abstention signal, not as a safe replacement

categoriesConsideredAndRejected.cropClipping: no - the recorded candidate geometry contains the digits in both cases
categoriesConsideredAndRejected.normalizationRemovedIt: no - canonicalization never saw the missing digit
categoriesConsideredAndRejected.windowConstructionExcludedIt: no - windows form correctly around what OCR produced
categoriesConsideredAndRejected.correctAlternateResultNotConsumed: no - no existing pass produced the correct value for either case
